name: LearnUpon LMS API
what_it_does: LearnUpon LMS REST API for employee training, customer education, and partner enablement with multi-portal management. Enables AI agents to manage user enrollment and course assignment for automated training delivery workflow, handle multi-portal (tenant) management for separated employee/customer/partner training deployment, access course completion tracking and certification for compliance training automation, retrieve learning analytics and reporting for L&D business intelligence, manage learning path and curriculum for structured training program automation, handle SCORM/xAPI/AICC course content deployment for e-learning delivery automation, access gamification elements for learner engagement automation, retrieve manager team reporting and learner progress visibility for performance management integration, manage HRIS user sync and automated provisioning for learner lifecycle automation, and integrate LearnUpon with HRIS (BambooHR, Workday, ADP), Salesforce, Zendesk, and SSO providers for enterprise learning ecosystem.
use_cases: Onboarding employees from HR automation agents
Training customers from customer success agents
Enabling partners from channel training agents
best_when: A mid-market to enterprise organization wanting AI agents to automate employee onboarding training, customer education delivery, partner enablement, and compliance certification across multiple audiences within separate LearnUpon portals with a clean REST API.
avoid_when: GDPR EU LEARNER DATA RESIDENCY: LearnUpon processes EU employee and customer learner data in AWS infrastructure; automated processing of EU personal data must be configured for EU region deployment; automated EU learner data processing in US region without data residency configuration creates GDPR Chapter V concern. COMPLIANCE TRAINING COMPLETION RECORD INTEGRITY: Automated LearnUpon compliance training completion records for HIPAA, OSHA, or financial regulatory training must capture individual acknowledgment with timestamp and course version; automated bulk completion marking without individual record creates regulatory audit gap. SCORM VERSION COMPATIBILITY: LearnUpon supports SCORM 1.2 and SCORM 2004; automated SCORM content deployment must match content package version to LearnUpon-supported version; automated deployment of SCORM 2004 Edition 4 packages to SCORM 1.2-configured course creates tracking failure. Multi-portal tenant isolation — automated API access across LearnUpon portals must use portal-specific API credentials; automated cross-portal data access without proper portal credential isolation creates tenant data privacy breach.

auth.notes: LearnUpon uses API key authentication (HTTP Basic Auth with API key). REST API with JSON. Dublin, Ireland HQ (LearnUpon Ltd.). Founded 2012. Private (Summit Partners growth equity investor). 1,500+ customers globally. Multi-portal LMS for employee, customer, and partner training on separate portals. SCORM 1.2/2004, xAPI, AICC support. SSO via SAML, LDAP, OAuth. Competes with Absorb, TalentLMS, and Docebo for corporate LMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-active-user annual subscription with portal pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by active user count and portal count; Essential, Premium, Enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: Dublin Ireland. Private, Summit Partners investor. Founded 2012. 1,500+ customers. Multi-portal focus. Per-active-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; course and user API throttled; webhooks for enrollment and completion events

known_agent_gotchas: API KEY PER PORTAL — NOT GLOBAL: LearnUpon API key is portal-specific; automated agents managing multiple portals (employee, customer, partner) require separate API key per portal; single API key access to all portals is not supported; plan multi-portal API credential management before multi-audience automation

SCORM VERSION MISMATCH FOR CONTENT DEPLOYMENT: Automated SCORM content upload must match package version to LearnUpon course configuration (SCORM 1.2 vs SCORM 2004); automated deployment of wrong SCORM version creates completion tracking failure; implement version detection in automated content pipeline

COMPLIANCE COMPLETION ACKNOWLEDGMENT INTEGRITY: Automated compliance course completion marking should capture individual learner completion event, not bulk-import completion; automated bulk completion for regulatory training (HIPAA, OSHA) without individual event record creates audit trail deficiency

Webhook deduplication for enrollment and completion events — LearnUpon webhooks for user enrollment and course completion may deliver duplicate events during system retry; implement LearnUpon user_id + course_id + event_type deduplication before downstream compliance action triggers

GDPR Irish/EU data residency for EU employees — LearnUpon is Irish company with EU-first data residency; verify EU region deployment for EU employee learning data; EU data residency is LearnUpon default but confirm configuration for specific compliance requirements

User deprovisioning for suspended learners — LearnUpon user deactivation suspends account access but retains completion history; automated terminated employee deprovisioning must use suspend (not delete) to preserve compliance training record; automated deletion destroys required compliance records
agent_readiness.security_notes: Corporate LMS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key. EU/US/AU. Employee and customer learning data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate LMS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key. EU/US/AU. Learning and compliance data.
